category_sources: source_facts.description says it checks coding standards in PHP, JavaScript, and CSS.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is PHP_CodeSniffer; source_facts.homepage points to that official repository.
docs_sources: Official PHPCSStandards GitHub wiki and README are the project documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/PHPCSStandards/PHP_CodeSniffer; repo intentionally not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable names phpcs/phpcbf identify coding-standard linting and fixing for PHP and related web code.
